stories.title: Live updates: France, Spain meet with World Cup fi...
MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
stories.summary: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

stories.title: Police investigation of Jets' Smith no longer acti...
stories.summary: An investigation of Geno Smith for an incident in which a woman accused him of battery last month is no longer active and the New York Jets quarterback will not be charged.

stories.title: Wiz end Dybantsa's summer league after 2 games
stories.summary: The Wizards are shutting AJ Dybantsa down for the final two games of summer league after an impressive debut from the rookie.

stories.title: Embattled Michigan AD Manuel not ready to go
stories.summary: Michigan athletic director Warde Manuel is defending his resume; and says he does not want to leave the school.
